checks.description: Break open the swollen cellar door.
checks.success_text: The door cracks open under the blow.

checks.description: Keep steady in the dark below.
checks.failure_text: Panic turns every sound into a threat.

checks.description: Climb the tree to reach the cat.
checks.success_text: You skillfully climb the tree and reach the cat, but they climb further...
checks.failure_text: You slip and fall, failing to reach the cat.

checks.description: Cat cat goes further up the tree...
checks.success_text: You skillfully climb the tree and reach the cat.
checks.failure_text: You slip and fall, failing to reach the cat.
